parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama3:8b', prompt: 'Summarize this document concisely. Provide:
1. A one-paragraph executive summary
2. Key points (5-7 bullet points)
3. Action items (if any)
4. Key entities mentioned (people, companies, dates)

Document:
' + $json.text.substring(0, 6000), stream: false, options: { temperature: 0.3, num_predict: 1500 } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama3:8b', prompt: 'Based on this document, generate 5 insightful questions that a reader might want answered, along with brief answers based on the document content.

Document:
' + $('Extract & Prepare Text').first().json.text.substring(0, 6000) + '

Format as:
Q1: [question]
A1: [answer]
...', stream: false, options: { temperature: 0.4, num_predict: 1500 } }) }}
